passwordsHint: Passwords are never sent to any server. The SHA-1 hash is computed in your browser and only the first 5 characters are transmitted (k-anonymity).
emailsHint: Enter email addresses to check for data breaches via XposedOrNot.
label: Label
checkIntervalHelp: How often to check for new breaches (1–168 hours)
manualCheckHint: Trigger an immediate check of all configured passwords and emails.
